// 03 — PROJECTS

Loyihalar

FEATURED PROJECT
Telegram Bot Platformasi
Python va aiogram asosida qurilgan multifunksional Telegram bot. Foydalanuvchi boshqaruvi, avtomatik javoblar, buyruq tizimi, admin panel va inline klaviatura bilan.
Python aiogram Telegram API SQLite
2024 · Bot Development
PROJECT 02
Landing Page
Zamonaviy va to'liq responsive landing page. Smooth scroll, CSS animatsiyalar va chiroyli UI bilan.
HTML CSS JavaScript
2024 · Frontend
PROJECT 03
React Dashboard
React hooks, state management va API integratsiyasi bilan qurilgan dinamik admin dashboard.
React JavaScript CSS
2024 · React
PROJECT 04
UI/UX Dizayn
Figma va Adobe Illustrator yordamida yaratilgan professional dizayn loyihalari. Wireframe va prototip.
Figma Illustrator Photoshop
2024 · Design
PROJECT 05
E-commerce Site
To'liq funksional onlayn do'kon. Mahsulot katalogi, savat va to'lov tizimi bilan.
Python Flask JavaScript CSS
2024 · Fullstack
PROJECT 06
3D Portfolio Scene
Blender yordamida yaratilgan interaktiv 3D portfolio sahnasi va animatsiyalar.
Blender 3D Animation
2024 · 3D Design
